subject: fix(embedding): concurrency guards, cleanup, and dismissed pair rendering
body:
Guard embeddingService batch operations against concurrent calls with
batchInProgress flag. terminateEngine() now rejects all pending promises
instead of leaving them hanging. Eliminated double buildArcText()
computation in computeWorkspaceArcEmbeddings by counting during the
loop. DuplicateScannerModal now hides dismissed pairs instead of
rendering them dimmed. Removed stale View Configuration comment header
from types/index.ts.

Tags: phase-7, embedding, duplicates, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: semantic-duplicate-detection
Semver: patch
